summary: Frontend-only testing of landing page redesign with saturated section colors, mesh gradients, and Framer Motion animations. All 30 UI tests passed (100%). Bold/saturated section colors verified (#d1fae5 green, #bfdbfe blue, #e9d5ff violet, #fed7aa orange, #1e1b4b dark indigo footer). Creative animations working: MorphingHello cycles through 10 languages, SoundWave animated bars, FloatingChars script characters, MeshBackground animated gradient orbs.
passed_tests: Navbar visible with data-testid='navbar'
Logo button (data-testid='logo-button') visible
Nav Get Started button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') visible
Nav links present: Features, How it works, Scenarios
Get Started button navigates to /auth for unauthenticated users
Hero section (data-testid='hero-section') with background rgb(248, 247, 244)
Hero has MorphingHello text cycling through languages (Hello, Bonjour, Hola, etc.)
Hero has animated SoundWave visualization (38 bars)
Hero has MeshBackground with 3 animated gradient orbs
Hero has FloatingChars script characters (あñüش한ç你жθêßø)
Hero AI Language Tutor badge displayed
Hero Start a conversation button navigates to /auth
Hero View Dashboard button (data-testid='hero-dashboard-btn') visible
Features section (data-testid='features-section') with BOLD GREEN background rgb(209, 250, 229)
Features section has 4 inline strips: Voice-First, Karaoke Tracking, Live AI Tools, Adaptive Curriculum
Features strips have colored icons with hover animations
How it works section (data-testid='tools-section') with BOLD BLUE background rgb(191, 219, 254)
How it works shows 4 timeline steps with STEP 01-04 labels
Timeline gradient line from blue-400 to transparent
Demo section (data-testid='demo-section') with BOLD VIOLET background rgb(233, 213, 255)
Demo section shows animated chat messages with SoundWave
Demo Try it yourself button (data-testid='demo-try-btn') navigates to /auth
Scenarios section (data-testid='scenarios-section') with BOLD ORANGE background rgb(254, 215, 170)
Scenarios section shows 5 floating pill tags: Job Interview, Travel, Restaurant, Small Talk, Business
Scenario pills have parallax scroll animation
CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') with MeshBackground animated orbs
CTA heading 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' displayed
CTA Begin your first lesson button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') navigates to /auth
Footer (data-testid='footer') with DARK INDIGO background rgb(30, 27, 75)
Footer shows mumble logo and 3 navigation buttons (Practice, Dashboard, Vocabulary)
critical_code_review_comments: Saturated section colors successfully applied - much bolder than previous light pastel theme
MeshBackground component creates beautiful animated gradient orbs for hero and CTA
MorphingHello AnimatePresence cycles through 10 languages with blur/slide transitions
SoundWave creates dynamic animated bar heights for audio visualization effect
FloatingChars drifts script characters (あñüش한ç) with Framer Motion animations
All data-testid attributes present and unchanged from previous iteration
Navigation flows correctly redirect unauthenticated users to /auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign with SATURATED/BOLD colors complete. All color backgrounds verified: hero=#f8f7f4 (cream), features=#d1fae5 (bold green), tools=#bfdbfe (bold blue), demo=#e9d5ff (bold violet), scenarios=#fed7aa (bold orange), cta=#f8f7f4 (cream with mesh), footer=#1e1b4b (dark indigo). Creative animations: MorphingHello (10 language cycle), SoundWave (animated bars), FloatingChars (script drift), MeshBackground (gradient orbs). Auth page working. Demo: demo@mumble.app/demo123
